channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: JWords Announces New Album Sound Therapy
item.description: 🎧 Dive into good vibes with JWords' upcoming album Sound Therapy! Let the music heal your soul! 🌟 #NewMusicAlert #JWords #SoundTherapy

item.title: The Hives played Brooklyn Paramount with The Chats (pics)
item.description: 🔥 Rocked Brooklyn! The Hives and The Chats brought the house down with epic energy! Check out the pics now! 🎸🎶 #RockOn

item.title: Muse Launch New Album The Wow! Signal in Space
item.description: 🚀 Muse takes us on an interstellar journey with their latest album, The Wow! Signal! 🎶✨ #OutofThisWorld #MuseMusic

item.title: Puscifer To Launch Spring 2026 North American Tour
item.description: 🎉 Puscifer hitting the road for a spring adventure across North America! Who's ready to rock out with them? 🤘 #PusciferTour2026

item.title: Black Veil Brides Announce New Album Vindicate, Unveil Title Track: Stream
item.description: 🔥 Rock on! Black Veil Brides drop a major bombshell with their new album Vindicate and title track! Stream it now! 🎸 #NewMusicAlert
